title: olearia rugosa subsp. distalilobata
intro: Olearia rugosa subsp. distalilobata, also known as the rough tree daisy, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the Asteraceae family. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe and calm the body. The health benefits of Olearia rugosa subsp. distalilobata include reducing inflammation, relieving anxiety and stress, and supporting immune function, making it a popular natural remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant are often infused in tea or made into tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
